cookieBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By using our site, you agree to our cookie policy.

whatWeCollect.title: What Cookies We Collect
whatWeCollect.body: We collect essential cookies required for the operation of our platform, including session cookies and preference cookies.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body: Cookies are used to maintain your session, remember your preferences, and improve the performance and functionality of our marketplace.

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.body: Cookies are retained for the duration of your session or up to 12 months for persistent preferences.

hero.headline: The Marketplace for Modern Commerce
hero.subheadline: Connect buyers and sellers on a transparent, commission-based platform built for scale.

transparent.title: Transparent Commissions
transparent.description: Know exactly what you pay. Our commission model is clear, predictable, and competitive.

scalable.title: Built to Scale
scalable.description: From your first listing to thousands of transactions, our infrastructure grows with you.

trusted.title: Trusted by Sellers
trusted.description: Join a community of verified sellers and reach buyers who are ready to purchase.

commissionInfo.title: Simple Commission Model
commissionInfo.description: We charge a flat commission on each successful transaction — no hidden fees, no monthly charges.
commissionInfo.note: Commission is deducted automatically at the time of sale.
